/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbooster_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/booster_msgs/libbooster_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/booster_msgs/msg/_binary_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/booster_msgs/msg/_rpc_req_msg_s.c.o CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/booster_msgs/msg/_rpc_resp_msg_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/booster/Workspace/robocup_demo/build/booster_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libbooster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libbooster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
